description.short: Instant, Private, and Seamless File Sharing
description.full: Upload files on one device, scan a QR code, and download them on another. No accounts, no tracking, just transfer. Files are encrypted at rest and sessions auto-expire after your chosen duration. Supports images, documents, videos, archives — any file type up to 200 MB.

minimum.notes: Requires internet connection. Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime (included in Windows 10 1809+ and Windows 11).

copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Simar Singh Rayat. All rights reserved.

msix.signing: Not required — Partner Center re-signs with Microsoft certificate during ingestion
msix.silent_install: Automatic — MSIX installs silently by design
msix.code_signing: Automatic — Microsoft re-signs during Store ingestion

exe_installer.signing: REQUIRED — must use CA-trusted SHA256 code signing certificate (self-signed NOT accepted)
exe_installer.add_remove_programs: Handled by Inno Setup installer with explicit registry entries

store_submission_steps: 1. Register at https://partner.microsoft.com/ (one-time $19 fee for individual)
2. Create a new app reservation — note the Package Identity Name and Publisher (CN=XXXXX)
3. Update AppxManifest.xml: set Identity Name and Publisher to match Partner Center values
4. MSIX path: Run build_msix.bat, upload dist\filecp.msix to Partner Center
5. EXE path: Run build_store.bat, select Win32 Package in Partner Center, host filecp_setup.exe at the Package URL, provide silent install params
6. Fill in Store listing: description, screenshots (1366x768 min), privacy policy URL
9. Run validate_store.bat to verify all checks pass before submission

silent_install_check.fix_msix: MSIX installs silently by design — no action needed
silent_install_check.fix_exe: Removed PrivilegesRequiredOverridesAllowed=dialog from installer.iss; all wizard pages disabled

add_remove_programs.error: Could not identify app name and publisher in Add/Remove Programs
add_remove_programs.fix_msix: MSIX registers automatically — no action needed
add_remove_programs.fix_exe: Added [Registry] section in installer.iss with explicit DisplayName and Publisher entries

bundleware_check.error: Could not identify app name and publisher in Add/Remove Programs
bundleware_check.fix_msix: MSIX sandbox prevents bundleware — no action needed
bundleware_check.fix_exe: Same fix as Add/Remove Programs — proper registry entries

code_sign_check.error: App does not have a digital signature (Policy 10.2.9)
code_sign_check.fix_msix: Partner Center re-signs with Microsoft certificate — submit unsigned
code_sign_check.fix_exe: build_store.bat creates and applies self-signed cert; for Store, purchase CA-trusted SHA256 cert
